introSection: Launch Roller Coaster is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Sun Tzu Cultural Park in Guangrao, Dongying, Shandong, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Launch Roller Coaster is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Sun Tzu Cultural Park in Guangrao, Dongying, Shandong, China.



2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.
